entry.title: Q-UP v1.0.0
entry.content: # Q-AP v1.0 - Public Playtest **Info** [Game Page](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/blob/main-q-up/worlds/q_up/docs/en_Q-UP.md>) - [Setup Guide](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/blob/main-q-up/worlds/q_up/docs/setup_en.md>) **Downloads** [World](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/releases/>) - [Mod](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-mod/releases/>) ## Disclaimer The project status is **playable, but unstable**! If you are interested in reporting bugs and writing feedback, feel free to give this release a try. Otherwise better wait for a more stable version. You can share your bugs and feedback either here on Discord or on GitHub. Your help is greatly appreciated! ## Known Issues - Some seeds may generate impossible or extremely grindy worlds, please share your experiences so we can improve it together! ## Location checks already available - Rank & Level ups - Shop Upgrades - Challengesanity ## Items already available - All skills (item pool depends on chosen champ) - All shop upgrades - Crystals, Corruption Shards, Upgrade Points, Gold

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.0
entry.content:
## New features * Split qualities and space locations into separate items when split technologies is on by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/38 * Implements start inventory from pool by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/39
## Improvements * Set technologies as essential if they contain an advancement item by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/48 * Move more texts to static locale file by @Enderdraak in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/53 * Add uranium-fuel-cell and steam from boiler to logic by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/60
## Fixes * Sort craftsanity item pool to ensure consistent ordering by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/51 * Fix free samples crashing when there is a platform pending construction by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/54, https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/56 * Resync non-tech unlocks on technology effect reset by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/55
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.3.0...platformer-0.4.0

entry.title: Q-UP v1.0.1
entry.content: - Fix broken template yaml

entry.title: Zelda's Adventure GDX v0.1.0r4
entry.content: ## Game changes * Hid the debug text behind a debug toggle * The ruby HUD icon now turns yellow when connected to the AP server APWorld remains unchanged from 0.1.0! **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1

entry.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.2.0.post2
entry.content:
# v0.2.0 Recipe Rando and visual overhaul **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2...yohane_bitdb-v0.2.0
# New Features - Recipesanity, randomizes the ingredients required for crafting items - Craftsanity, randomizes the results of crafting recipes, turning them into checks - Received Items are now displayed with an item popup on the left (found items for other games are not displayed) - Save files store the current slot name and seed name, preventing loading of vanilla or other seed's save files
# Internal - Tests have been added - Debug info is displayed by default when running from source - massive client refactor

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.3.5a0
entry.content: - Incremented version number - Fixed duplicate world unlock items (for real this time)

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.4.1
entry.content:
- Fixed an error preventing players from connecting if starting world was set to random and avoid early BK was enabled - Fixed an error preventing players from being granted received thief moves - Fixed an error that caused extra episode unlock items to be created if starting world was set to "All" - Added item groups and location groups (@phoenixaki) - Adds support for speed tricks via new YAML option (@phoenixaki) - Improved documentation (@phoenixaki)
NOTE: This update changes the names of many existing items. This should still be compatible with worlds generated on v0.3.0 and onward, but you may wish to avoid upgrading if you're in the middle of a seed.

entry.title: Paper Mario v0.6.7
entry.content:
## Other
* AP data for trackers * Add bouncing of the player's current location in the game world, so trackers and other tools can access this information live.

entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.7
entry.content: Fixed the password prompt on the client - Thank you to Ishmael for the report and DodoBirb for the quick diagnosis!

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.2
entry.content:
# Minecraft Fabric (1.1.2)
Was planning on having this out sooner, but held off due to wanting to get some bigger stuff here. Decided that it would be best to release the bugfix now and do the bigger stuff a little later.
Mod Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/archipelago-mod AP World Link: https://github.com/Deadlydiamond98/MinecraftFabricAPWorld/releases Wiki: https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod
Changelog:
Minecraft
- Fixed a logic where Stone Tools were required for anything that requires smelting to be in logic - Fixed Wither Summoning Being off-screen in the item tracker - Changed the Chance for Wither Skeletons to drop skulls when the option is enabled from 25% to 50% - Hired Help now requires Shears - Piglin Heads now require Nether Access - Updated Logic for suspicious sand and gravel to account for Cobwebs - Sculk Items are now under exploration - Dry Sponge now requires Smelting - Sniffer Egg is now considered a Hard Item - Black Dye now either requires Swimming or Wither Summoning - Updated Logic For Smooth Stone and Smooth Deepslate - Fixed Clay ball requiring Nether Access (No idea how this happened) - Chests, Bottles, Brushes, Buckets, Fishing Rods, Flint & Steel / Igniters, Minecarts, Shields, & Shears now lock things in their respective Common tags
Create
- fixed logic error with Raw Zinc where it also required Compacting to be considered in logic - fixed logic error where Copper Diving Helmets were considered in logic before getting proper armor tier.
Iron Chests: Restocked
- Fixed Chest Upgrades being locked behind Chests & Barrels (as they don’t require chests nor allow for obtaining chests)

entry.title: IslesOfSeaAndSky v2.0.0b0
entry.content:
Now compatible with the current version of Isles of Sea and Sky v2.6a (first release). This version will very likely have bugs, debug mode is enabled so that you can press ctrl + g in game to toggle god mode if you need to get an item.
Features: - All 120 star pieces randomized - All 76-77 Ancient Keys randomized - All 48 elementals gems and all 14-18 obsidian are randomized (there's also an option to leave them in their vanilla locations) - Option to include pyramidions and the serpent circlet in randomization - Option to include meteorites and warps in randomization - The 3rd ending is available as a new goal option - The amount of Star Pieces and Pyramidions needed to unlock the 2nd and 3rd endings can be configured.
Some features have been cut so that this update could release sooner. I'd like to add them back overtime as the apworld gets more stable. Cut features: - locksanity - snakesanity - secretsanity - seashells - jellyfish - alt rooms

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past v1.2.2r2
entry.content: Fixed a bug where the client would crash when receiving an item from a player with an ID above 255.

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.3
entry.content: Reverts some stuff in text formatting

entry.title: IslesOfSeaAndSky v2.0.0
entry.content:
Fixes for various logic issues.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cuberyl-catastrophe/Archipelago/compare/iosas-ap-v2.0.0b...iosas-ap-v2.0.1b

entry.title: Zuma Deluxe v0.1.3b0
entry.content:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe
This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.
Details Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)
Remainders You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play
If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu.
If the game is not found it probably is the language of it
To keep track of locations use universal tracker
when entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise
Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.
Have Fun

entry.title: Zuma Deluxe v0.1.3
entry.content:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe
This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.
### Last Fixes
- Deathlink Toggle working correctly - Clear Locations being sended from Gauntlet
### Details Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)
### Remainders - You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play - If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu. - If the game is not found it probably is the language of it - To keep track of locations use universal tracker - When entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise - Deathlink accelerates the game into a own death, rush trap just does it for a second and smaller
Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.
Have Fun

entry.title: Zuma Deluxe v0.1.3r2
entry.content:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe
This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.
### Last Fixes - Solving an Issue in client for Singular Modes
###Details Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)
###Remainders - You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play - If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu. - If the game is not found it probably is the language of it - To keep track of locations use universal tracker - When entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise - Deathlink accelerates the game into a own death, rush trap just does it for a second and smaller Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.
Have Fun

entry.title: sonic_frontiers v0.2.0
entry.content: Ares is here!

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.11
entry.content:
I genuinely can't remember what I changed with this update. I've been busy, and also decided to enable hard mode in life, whoops. It probably works, but I'll mark as pre-release just to be sure. For some reason the tracker doesn't track settlements in spheres mode, I dunno why.
This should at least fix some inconsistencies with spheres mode using the distance of the settlements rather than the distance of the faction's capital.
New [submods](https://github.com/jordansds/TWW3-Recruit-Without-Buildings/releases) available if you want to recruit units without buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.9...v0.10.10

entry.title: Arkham Horror The Card Game v0.1.3
Zuma Deluxe v0.1.5
entry.content:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe
This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.
## Last Fixes - Minor fix in deathlink toggle. - Adding the manual tab, to be able to debug some data and send locations in case of bugs - Reduce the minimun amount of Adventure Levels to 3 like a normal temple - Solved issue sending levels clear and scores since the pointer was bad ### Details Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)
### Remainders - You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play - If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu. - If the game is not found it probably is the language of it - To keep track of locations use universal tracker
- When entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise - Deathlink accelerates the game into a own death, rush trap just does it for a second and smaller
Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game. Have Fun

entry.title: Mega Man Legends v0.3.0
entry.content:
## Very Important! **Duckstation MUST be running with the following non-default setting:** ``` Settings > Console > CPU Emulation > Execution Mode = Interpreter (Slowest) ``` This is because the client makes many runtime edits to the game's code. These will fail if Duckstation if running in Recompiler mode (default).
## New Features - Break linearity of the game's story with *region lock options*, each of which with Open, Randomized, and Vanilla options. If Randomized, corresponding items are shuffled into the pool with corresponding locations. If Open, the areas are automatically unlocked. - **Citizen's Card**: Controls access to the city. - **Class B License**: Controls access to the Underground Ruins. - **Class A License**: Controls access to the Sub-Gates. - **Unlock Main Gate**: ... - **Unlock Sub-Cities**: ... - A new "Defeat All Bosses" goal ("boss" = enemy with a health bar). - The option to shuffle your first special weapon (in place of the Splash Mine) across any desired subset of special weapons. If selected, the Splash Mine is shuffled into the item pool. - The option to shuffle Buster Max into the item pool. - The Cardon Forest Sub-Gate Keys are now proper items and locations. - Defeating Gai-nee Tooren in the Uptown Sub-city is now a location (and included in the "Defeat All Bosses" goal).
## Other Changes & Improvements - The client no longer requires running as administrator. Just make sure Duckstation is not running as admin either. - The client now loads your previous login host and slot for convenience from a log in the local directory. - The "Complete museum" location has been removed. The individual museum item turn-ins and the prism crystal are still a locations. - The Spring Set item is replaced with the Jump Springs. - The Mine Parts Kit item is replaced with the Splash Mine. - Many backend changes & improvements, e.g. the underlying client is upgraded to a more recent version.
## Bug Fixes - Some black screen bugs are handled (e.g. after Juno). - Fixed a bug where receiving a buster part could delete other buster parts. - Fixed issue where certain locations were getting released early with other locations. - Zenny will be re-received upon reloading a save such that you will not lose any zenny upon death. - Items that are already turned in or used in crafting will no longer be re-received after reloading a save. - Fixed issue where Anna side quest would always give Sun-light. Same for Ira quest which always gave Flower pearl.
## Caveats - This game is still in a pre-release state. Various bugs may persist which may render your seed incompletable. - If any bugs or crashes are encountered, please run "!debug" in the client and send me a screenshot of the result. - Since the v0.3.0 beta, most bugs have either fixed or assumed to be fixed. Let me know if you still encounter any of these beta bugs previously discussed!
Please read the Wiki page to learn more about various in-game logic requirement decisions that were made and implemented for this open world update: https://github.com/functorial/MMLAP/wiki/Open-World-Logic-and-Definitions
This update was very tricky to implement and would have been impossible without all the help from the community: - Uroogla for the code contributions, feedback, and constant stream of general helpfulness. - Alejandro for finding the memory address corresponding to game progression state, which serves as the basis of the open world update via multiple fast-forwarding methods. - TheCopperCat for enduring multiple nights of broken multiworld sessions with me. - The following people for bravely playtesting this version's broken beta and submitting bug reports: SavageWizzrobe, MacNCheese, Nitrocosmic, Colbydude, Ikari, deon, Zizzle, Slightly Angry Eevee, Raven Wolf, Maplelink64, Flitter, Patchwork, Megarexs, MainStun, All Meshed Up, SkyLinKo, Prin. - Everyone else unmentioned who offered feedback, suggestions, and encouragement.

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.6.0
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.6.0 **Branch:** main **Date:** 2026-07-10 10:37 UTC
📜 Summary (1431 changes since v0.5.3) - RAC3: Fix JP MAIN_MENU/MAP_CHECK address conversion (9eb5f736d) - RAC3: Fix JP Florana vendor address range boundary (81482d9b7) - RAC3: Update JP version support status in FAQ (bf050f5ac) - RAC3: Update JP version status message to beta/completable (dd9aa4b59) - RAC3: Add initial support for JP version (280786c97) - RAC3: Standardize Shortcuts option keys (878a8f574) - Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/hacker-skip' into hacker-skip (f12175bf3) - RAC3: Small fixes to Holostar Teleporter, Vendor Access and Vendor Scouting (a9030439d) - RAC3: Improve message of development commands when used in normal builds (dd8c15e0d) - RAC3: Add option for items to be added to vendors when the infobot is collected (b997e8880) - RAC3: Holostar Teleporter Shortcut (f8c338095) - RAC3: Mark Post Hideout Assault as stable (003d22365) - RAC3: Add Find Qwark Location (d7b553625) - RAC3: Overhaul starting inventory handling (0f3672ca4) - RAC3: Add some Region debugging (e6ff27322) - RAC3: Allow all OptionCounter options to accept any value greater than 1 (6eaa505d7) - RAC3: Remove Suck it Up skillpoint from simple skillpoints (657fa0964) - RAC3: Allow any number input to enable scout vendors (7a7a32899) - RAC3: Add Gadgetron Debt Trap (ac300c7d4) - RAC3: Make /rac3_info for actions print out the IDs in hex (1b595aecb) - RAC3: Fix bolt pack offline fillers not working (d87af092d) - RAC3: Update UnitTest for Intro Skip default setting (7c7977742) - RAC3: Handle RYNO level cap command in weapon level tracking (d9bb600c6) - RAC3: Deprecate unused functions and constants (7a911067c) - RAC3: Parameter cleanup (4e2483292) - RAC3: Formatting (998716df7) - RAC3: Fix tyhrraguise puzzles on command center disappearing after refractor skip (0cbc099e7) - RAC3: Put Aridia mission 3 in logic if you have a long range weapon (94fc08ec7) - RAC3: Unlock sewers if homewarping from aquatos base + Fix broken rift inducer and qwack o ray level logic (c7716bf92) - RAC3: Remove shield charger levels if one hp challenge is enabled for ratchet (46217ccc6) - RAC3: Remove ammo from the vendor of weapons we dont have unlocked yet (893811555) - RAC3: Add 1ms to to jackpot timer if a new jackpot filler would perfectly overlap with an existing one (e4351eab2) - RAC3: Add stored fillers to server side save data (a969d7766) - RAC3: Grammar fixes in the yaml (e1dacb71b) - RAC3: Re-organize the NGPlusItems yaml description (c53229fa6) - RAC3: Fix formatting on region disabled message (141fde2ec) - RAC3: Update pypine (71e14832f) - RAC3: Make yaml more readable (b60fb5663) - RAC3: documentation change (548db952a) - RAC3: Add warning messages if people go to disabled regions (9f927744b) - RAC3: 4 bytes of storage per filler instead of 1 (62653af01) - RAC3: Fix addresses of stored fillers (6c1cd6e5a) - RAC3: Make PDA vendor scanning more reliable and add message to nation if you go there with it disabled (42398a8f5) - RAC3: Clarify shortcuts and speedups yaml (eceaa483c) - RAC3: Cap offline fillers at 255 (624183bbb) - RAC3: Update PyPINE (fd14f1055) - RAC3: Add last refractor door on command center to refractor skip (aa5c27ad1) - RAC3: Add more stuff to /rac3_info (9ba1cfbda) - RAC3: Prevent the use of locked weapons (a9140928a) - RAC3: Make newer yaml enabled/disabled options be consistent with the rest (55c63bebf) - RAC3: Fix latching jackpot fillers causing multiplier to stick at a too high value (7918c3021) - RAC3: Move helpdesk option to a new QoL section of the yaml (8d0276d94) - RAC3: Fix nanotech exp sometimes getting reset when processing offline nanotech fillers (330b075e0) - RAC3: Make main menu message reappear if you go back to main menu after game start (e38d0c738) - RAC3: Fix NG+ nanotech not respecting nanotech limitation (1a7ec4f90) - RAC3: rename skill master calc function (2ba0c4c55) - RAC3: Remember that the infernox skillpoint is a thing (0eada1c2c) - RAC3: make sure skill master trophy truely isn't in the pool if all 30 skill points arent either (ebcca0dc1) - RAC3: Fix omega weapons not showing up when progressive weapons are off (04d2f6d83) - RAC3: Improve notification for offline fillers (a33726589) - RAC3: Offline Fillers (39aee2381) - RAC3: Add missing function call to handle game ready (c21bd1eb3) - RAC3: Add helpdesk yaml option (3fbb65498) - RAC3: Force manual progressive weapons mode in more places if necessary (e3ea36936) - RAC3: Split progressive weapon leveling into manual and automatic (3d84aa783) - RAC3: Add weapon level locations to progressive weapons (fdd7716ff) - RAC3: Allow more permissive generation if in a big enough multiworld (433e2ea43) - RAC3: Fix no space between messages in handle not enough locations (47e0f49ca) - RAC3: Fix missing world.player in can reach region (e94d98713) - RAC3: Make good exp function setting independent (9cbd4c9e7) - RAC3: Fix fuzzing failures (eb6d4e8a1) - RAC3: Add special connection error message if you connect with the wrong Ratchet game. (7749419bc) - RAC3: Update NG+ items yaml description and add Weapon Level before weapon level locations (098f6896f) - RAC3: Make veldin skip the default (5d4641ad9) - RAC3: teeny tiny optimization to the cycle cache (bfd242f36) - RAC3: massively optimize nanotech and sewer crystal location reads (12e471f0a) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (30dc0a279) - RAC3: Fix softlocked death link message for automatic softlocks (88066a875) - RAC3: Add failsafe for return to phoenix after grand prize bout (ecda44747) - RAC3: Mark VR Gadget training as stable (c8b768ae4) - RAC3: NG+ can always earn good xp (e51fb0713) - RAC3: Adjust good exp logic (29a4f631f) - RAC3: Add weapon levels are locations (1a0192062) - RAC3: Skip OptionError stuff if using UT is true (2be1efd65) - RAC3: Mark previous useful weapon as progression skip balancing (80aa60921) - RAC3: Also add weapon levels to weapon levels dict if progressive weapons are enabled (4fb488f6b) - RAC3: Fix omega arsenal getting checked on connect (589c5766e) - RAC3: Force omega arsenal trophy if all requirements are met (51118e33e) - RAC3: Move PAL shift minimum address up further to prevent vid comic ship teleport bugs (765b89d5a) - RAC3: Fix nanofinder trophy logic (adf028f59) - RAC3: Re-add missing level 100 nanotech... whoops (f3ed7c9b6) - RAC3: Adjust logic for weapon challenges in NG+ (5d1422292) - RAC3: Update NG+ nanotech logic once again (a30e4e664) - RAC3: temporarily comment out more WIP options to avoid confusion (c512698f8) - RAC3: Make NG+ Nanotech logic no longer distinguish between NG+ with or without multiplier (f6edfa02d) - RAC3: Re-adjust NG+ nanotech logic (b0a486634) - RAC3: Mark master plan and star map locations as stable (c429077c4) - RAC3: Add NG+ trophies (604ea30e2) - RAC3: Add up to 200 nanotech (6686e388b) - RAC3: Temporarily comment out the broken shortcuts/speedups and make all nanotech in logic if NGPlus is enabled regardless of multiplier (96f9bfc63) - RAC3: Allow jackpot crates if multiplier is x1 and increase jackpot filler to 30 second to match vanilla (b8643daf0) - RAC3: Add NGPlus Start yaml option (c47be3374) - Add support WSL2 + Windows environment (#146) (195dbbcc1) - RAC3: Only convert address once when reading bits (67200b740) - RAC3: Fix Tyhrranosis dropship not being there immediately (aa63c399a) - RAC3: Improve NGPlusItems yaml description (e32970626) - RAC3: Update PyPine (322dc9002) - RAC3: Delay weapon level ups if currently upgrading weapon pause state is active (518f89d3d) - RAC3: Add cutscene flags file (dd4b70ada) - RAC3: If main function hasn't been initialized yet, then we assume main menu (9869ea727) - RAC3: Fix weapon vendor yaml option overruling ngplus items yaml option (cba5106ec) - RAC3: Use newly discovered max health address for one hp challenge for vehicles (5453c041f) - RAC3: Add museum hacker doors to hacker skip because why not (4b4636d70) - RAC3: Allow the shield charger to be added to quick select (c02d3e446) - RAC3: Fix first tower tyhrranosis bug (7c572f9f2) - RAC3: Skip server save data no longer used (dd5b742b2) - RAC3: Make vendor overwrite only happen once (eacdec553) - RAC3: Fix markdown violations (acac0031a) - RAC3: Florana drawbridge fix (0b51d377a) - RAC3: Fix client disconnecting if connecting before game is ready (c4d76dac3) - RAC3: Improve planet switching (9f40f328b) - RAC3: cycle through all shortcut options (50bca2f93) - RAC3: Prevent server spam when after goaled (0d7efa924) - RAC3: RYNO command fixes (f26bc3aea) - RAC3: Vid Comic 4 is not PAL shifted (55752e101) - RAC3: Fix homewarp addresses for vid comics (1b13ad178) - RAC3: Optimize more reads (4e1610114) - RAC3: Reduce log file sizes for a ton (1478c1a06) - RAC3: Add moby address to assertion message (64cd14c8f) - RAC3: Fix PDA Vendor sometimes being outside the typical moby range (c0a71d562) - RAC3: Fix KeyError if weapon/armor vendor is disabled (f6e43d00a) - RAC3: Fix infinite items in the vendor (45771af4a) - RAC3: set between planets to False initially (5b316ead9) - RAC3: optimise some reads (4f6f77cd9) - RAC3: fix checking between planets (ce7364ee0) - RAC3: Gadget respawn on new planet timing improvements (9253b223f) - RAC3: Simplify Holostar Clank fix (36688788a) - RAC3: Aridia and Holostar fixes (1d0819c90) - RAC3: Fix warnings and formatting (64369e8c4) - RAC3: Remove unnecessary dict (b4145c81f) - RAC3: Small optimization for vendor cursor reads (c14d2a222) - RAC3: Weapon level up no longer gives free mega variant (268d9218e) - RAC3: Don't put omega weapons in the vendor if progressive weapons (b054fa715) - RAC3: Fix xp getting reset back to level thredshold (f5b8a32d4) - RAC3: Fix weapon level restoration (2a6b26331) - RAC3: Add NGPlus weapons to the vendor if you have the V5 version (fe88fc906) - RAC3: Rename NG+ option names (22a83329d) - RAC3: /RYNO command supports any level value (4c4f3309c) - RAC3: Add NG+ Item and Vendor Options (9b105b41e) - RAC3: Prevent VR weapon test from collecting location (583dac28b) - RAC3: Fix TypeError (001379d29) - RAC3: Refactor moby scanning to use Ratchet pointer instead of moby table constants (0e7f331c5) - RAC3: Server Side Savedata (7d14c268b) - RAC3: Some Mission Bugfixes (da9cbe169) - RAC3: New Planet Handling (69d108135) - RAC3: Fix small bugs (5e2d1deb7) - RAC3: Fix various type and attribute errors (c8c9aa9ec) - RAC3: Add missing NGPlus location group (de120d7e4) - RAC3: Handle Tyhrranosis Dropship (8bc466dae) - RAC3: take intro skip into account for nanotech logic (a214d0356) - RAC3: Make dynamic nanotech logic (a2bffe07e) - RAC3: Post Vendor Balance Changes (0738f2c7b) - RAC3: Documentation (6aa85b84b) - RAC3: Shortcut Data Refactor (569174373) - RAC3: Add metropolis taxi shortcut (937271a91) - RAC3: Fix hacker skip on aquatos (91d9909d5) - RAC3: Add more shortcuts (e2c565895) - RAC3: correctly clear visited planets (abeb059fa) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (f6a5fd731) - RAC3: Tiny optimizations (c109d63b6) - RAC3: Optimize get visited planets (de91b308d) - RAC3: Add read/write count to update cycle debug log (253e5b3f6) - RAC3: Remove redundant sequence break about sasha (84dbd9c16) - RAC3: Fixed progress flags with multiple bits not getting set correctly (58c7b3b74) - RAC3: Fix gadget skips (cc47f1e1d) - RAC3: Fix write bits (3f0255b87) - RAC3: Fix errors (f95da2171) - RAC3: Add more Shortcuts (c420b69a8) - RAC3: Fix introskip (4112c14ba) - RAC3: Fix relative import that should have been absolute (9688b21a0) - RAC3: Split Progress and Moby flags (ecd70908d) - RAC3: Split Shortcuts and Speedups (d29568a02) - RAC3: Make reloading mark off the boolean that indicate that the refractor puzzles have been unlocked (4ce85725f) - RAC3: Remember to call the new cycler (0af2edcbb) - RAC3: Add more shortcut constants (382126a84) - RAC3: Begin refractor skip (6d721929c) - RAC3: Add Tyhrraguise skip (2ae6b1a32) - RAC3: Fix phoenix hacker skip (6615c4db8) - RAC3: Remove accents from messages (e793aab37) - RAC3: Fix Code cave getting set up before it is ready (28882ca21) - RAC3: Fix some characters not getting replaced with a question mark (b8996f02d) - RAC3: Fix small oversight (ce0092ea9) - RAC3: Code cleanup 3 (The Big One) (b2cbd1bca) - RAC3: Raise character limit in message boxes to 250 bytes (07a7e00b7) - RAC3: Allow homewarping in vid comics (b9814b244) - RAC3: Add load level dev command (b4f5e5a9a) - RAC3: Code cleanup 2 (Constants) (2de39b827) - RAC3: let people use development commands again, but everyone will know about it (c2ae2fbb0) - RAC3: Remove redundant connection check (fb27dc7ee) - RAC3: Minor puzzle check refactor (8828fd3c4) - RAC3: Code cleanup 1 (Client) (d2e1264f5) - RAC3: Make existing development command only available if on a development build (b69f9df3f) - RAC3: Fix Galaxy Burger (0dbf0565a) - RAC3: Update hacker skip yaml option description (4f4d30fb5) - RAC3: Remove start address debug logging and made it easier for traversal test command to use the table addresses automatically (4a3f33cde) - RAC3: Add holostar to PAL, whoops (67fffba03) - RAC3: Make reloading stop the moby searching (b452917d9) - RAC3: Add PAL addresses for hacker puzzle (85a730b6f) - RAC3: Fix aquatos gate not unlocking (ec4e1d9df) - RAC3: Write the number 5 for all objects (cf76cc26b) - RAC3: Changing planets counts as a reload (75c91dd65) - RAC3: Force the doors/elevators to open (928430565) - RAC3: Add client logging message too (056138e73) - RAC3: Make the hacker skip warning run only once per seed at most (0874f46fc) - RAC3: Change the bit for command center hacker puzzle (230096766) - RAC3: Remove messagebox debug logging (05345b114) - RAC3: Add hacker skip to proc options (7640d0752) - RAC3: Fix scout vender constant missing (ad6dddd3e) - RAC3: Make sure that hacker cycler actually gets called (e492b9ad4) - RAC3: Add warning if hacker is received on a planet with hacker skip enabled. (9fb6fc807) - RAC3: Add Progressflag class (7c7aee613) - RAC3: Add Hacker Skip yaml option (064269fbe) - RAC3: Add health cycler TODO (7aea4170b) - RAC3: Add message length validation to enqueue notification (80379d12f)\n- ...and 1231 more commits.
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.3...v0.6.0 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **main** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.2.1
entry.content:
# v0.2.1 Craftsanity hotfix **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.2.0...yohane_bitdb-v0.2.1
# Bug fixes - Fixed an error where craftsanity wouldn't actually add any locations
# Internal - More tests

entry.title: crashbash v0.1.0
entry.content:
# v0.1.0 - First Release
## What items and locations get shuffled?
Trophies, Gems, Crystals, Gold Relics and Warp Room Access are all items that are now shuffled into the multiworld. Locations are all the minigame challenges across all the warp rooms in the game.
Minigames will show you what locations you have cleared, the pause menu will show you an accurate count of each item you have.
## Notes and Limitations
1. Items are all remote, meaning you won't receive anything for completing a challenge until you connect or reconnect to the client. It is still safe to make progress in the game while disconnected. 2. There are some minigame requirements that are not stated in game, the option to play the games just won't appear. I will list them here: Jungle Fox / Metal Fox - Requires the Warp Room 2 Unlock item Toxic Dash - Requires the Warp Room 3 Unlock item 3. Gold Relics and Gold Relic challenges will not appear in your pause menu or as options to face in the minigames until you have entered Warp Room 4 (Forest) at least once. Logic accounts for this. 4. As noted in the yaml, the Platinum Relics option is currently always off even if you try and turn it on. 5. Entering Warp Room 5 for the first time will run the credits sequence once per save file. You can fast forward through it and continue as normal after!
# Documentation Links
[Info About the Crash Bash Randomizer](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Crash-Bash-PSX-Archipelago/blob/main/en_Crash%20Bash.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Crash-Bash-PSX-Archipelago/blob/main/setup_en.md)

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.1
entry.content:
## Fixes * Use __package__ instead of __name__ to fetch resources to make it work on older python versions by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/63 * Make progressive item collection more defensive by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/64
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.0...platformer-0.4.1

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.2
entry.content:
## Fixes
* Fix item name for progressive items created by create_item by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/65 * Fix wrongly named variable by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/66
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.1...platformer-0.4.2

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past v1.3.0
entry.content:
# v1.3.0
## Doors!!! * New option door_shuffle randomizes the layout of every dungeon * Rooms connect to each other in different ways, and any door between rooms might require a key or bombs * Each dungeon has its vanilla entrance room (e.g. Swamp Palace requires Flippers to enter), and all boss rooms are in their usual dungeon * Basic door shuffle randomizes each dungeon's layout, but each room stays within its own dungeon * Partitioned door shuffle can mix together rooms from different dungeons. Light World dungeons are shuffled together, early Dark World dungeons are shuffled together, and Mitts-locked dungeons are shuffled together. * Crossed door shuffle can place almost any room in any dungeon * New option lobby_shuffle also randomizes the first room in each dungeon * New option door_type_shuffle sets whether big key locked doors are also randomized. More options for randomizing trap doors will be added in the future * Mirror Scroll and dungeon counters to show the number of checks/keys in each dungeon are always enabled with door shuffle * Dungeon locations use their vanilla name, so e.g. "Ice Palace - Map Chest" might not be in Ice Palace * Known issues: * Generation is slow, and on occasion is extremely slow, mostly with more advanced door shuffle. I suggest restarting generation if it is taking a long time. * Some settings are not allowed with door shuffle to prevent excessive generation errors * Standard mode + door shuffle will throw an error during generation * Key drop shuffle is always enabled with door shuffle, regardless of settings * Small key shuffle is always enabled with partitioned or crossed door shuffle, regardless of settings * Universal Tracker sometimes fails to connect to a doors seed * Universal Tracker is sometimes wrong about dungeon items, usually by believing that an item behind a locked door is accessible * Door shuffle is inherently a bit volatile, and is not recommended for large multiworlds
## Not Doors! * New options for entrance shuffle to only randomize dungeon entrances * New options to shuffle the location of Link's House and the back of Tavern in crossed entrance shuffle * New option to enable dungeon counters that show the collected/total number of checks and keys in each dungeon * Similar options in the YAML have been grouped together * Hints in entrance shuffle now show the entrance(s) for their location * Fixed a bug where Flute Shuffle didn't work correctly with Universal Tracker * Fixed most generation errors

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.6.1
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- **Swift Runner logic** has been implemented for `medium` logic. Currently, this affects 1 location rule and 20 connection rules. To be super clear, since this has gotten a little complicated now: - This is only a change if you play with `logic_difficulty: medium` (or higher) and `randomize_skill_tree: true`. Before, Swift Runner jumps were "itemless"; medium logic would just expect you to perform them without listing any items. Now the Swift Runner item is explicitly required by logic, and this item matters because the skill will no longer be auto-unlocked. - If you play with `logic_difficulty: vanilla`, then nothing has changed. Swift Runner usage remains out of logic. If `randomize_skill_tree: true`, then there is a Swift Runner item, but it's only `useful`. - If you play with `logic_difficulty: medium` (or higher) and `randomize_skill_tree: false`, then nothing has changed. Swift Runner jumps are in logic, and the Swift Runner skill will continue to be auto-unlocked when you start the game. - The UT map pages for Grotto now show which portals are connected using colored lines and letters (thanks @Juanba ) - Skill rando tweaks: - Fixed hints and descriptions showing the content of a not-yet-revealed skill tree node (the ones still showing a padlock icon) after that node's vanilla skill is received. - In the randomized skill tree menu, the opacity of the AP logos in each randomized node has been reduced from 40% to 20%. - Shop and skill auto-hinting is now asynchronous / non-blocking. In particular, this means you should no longer feel the game freeze the first time you open the skill tree in a new slot, although it will still take the AP server a few seconds to generate the hints. - `vanilla` logic: - "ED (Passages) - Left Exit" to "Under Root Node" is now directly in logic with Grapple, CL and AD, without going through "Top Of TCK Platform Tutorial Room" first - "GoS (East): Spike Ball Hall Upper Left" logic has been changed from CL or AD to CL or (AD and LG), since I noticed just AD is not enough. This probably has no impact in practice since you either fall down from the root node which skips the jump where AD is not enough, or you arrive from below where CL is required anyway. - `medium` logic changes that aren't part of Swift Runner logic: - "ED (Living Area) - Opera Theater" to "East Building Rooftops" is now in logic with bow hover and CL - "ED (Passages): Above Transporter" now allows bow hover, TCK and CL (among other combinations), because you can bow hover from the ledge at the end of the laser gauntlet instead of the box we usually use for this location - "ED (Passages) - Left Exit" to "Under Root Node" is now directly in logic with bow hover or (grapple and CL and T-dash), without going through "Top Of TCK Platform Tutorial Room" first - "OW - Root Node & Middle Exits" to "Shortcut Elevator" is now in logic with WC and T-Dash - "OW - Shortcut Elevator" to "Robot" is now in logic with SR, CS-dash and LG - `ledge_storage` logic: - "AM - Highest Light Spinner" now allows parry hovering to either "Above Root Node" or "Upper Right Exit" with either CL setup, or T-dash setup plus Wall Climb (since using WC does not remove LS) - "Central Hall - Left" to "Center", i.e. going through CH Vents backwards, is now in logic with CL and LG by doing three triple jumps - "ED (Passages): Above Transporter" now allows (grapple and (CL or AD)) as another way to carry LS high enough to wall slide to the chest - "ED (Passages) - Left Exit" to "Under Root Node" is now directly in logic with parry hover and CL, without going through "Top Of TCK Platform Tutorial Room" first - "ED (Sanctum) - Root Node" to "Outside Nobility Hall" with a triple jump - Added `display_name`s to generation options that were missing them. If you've ever looked at a spoiler log and wondered why a few Nine Sols options were snake_case while most were Title Case, this is why.

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.3
entry.content:
## Fixes
* Fix inversed check that platform has hub by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/68
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.2...platformer-0.4.3

entry.title: Castlevania - Aria of Sorrow v2026.7.3r2
entry.content:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.
Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.
## Couple-of-Routing-Fixes Early-July Update ### Fixes * Fixes a few to-704/728-through-713 connection issues (reported by Lily) * Fixes the 903 upwards connection issue (I don't recall finding or fixing this and am not sure who did. Someone claim this!)

entry.title: Okami HD v0.5.0
entry.content:
# 0.5.0 ARC 2:
- Updated logic Up to Oni Island - New goal is now beating Orochi in Moon Cave, and Ninetails in Oni Island.
## Additional Fixes: - Add vine requirement to Kusa Village blockhead. - Exclude freestanding item in Calcified cavern as it doesn't work. - Account for chests in Agata Forest behind the bridge being able to be collected through Taka Pass. - Require Crescent to save Chun if the NightTimeCheck Option is enabled. - Removed Canine tracker, Border Key, Dragon Orb, Fox Rods, Shell Amulet and Treasure Box from item pool (They're either collected through their vanilla option that sets the flags for their use, or they cause softlocks) - Fix warps to cursed Agata Forest and Cursed Taka pass not taken into account - Fix Tsuta ruins and checks not requiring long swim at all

entry.title: Fire Emblem Sacred Stones v0.5.0.post2
entry.content:
Requires Archipelago >= 0.6.0
Drop `fe8.apworld` into your Archipelago install in `custom_worlds`. To open patch files, drag. the `.apfe8` file onto the `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe` file.
Changelog: - Added new randomization options, check the YAML for details!
Known issues: - FATAL: Playing with UnitSanity disabled is bugged, preventing *all* units from being deployed. - Chapters with lots of enemies on-screen at once can have visual glitches if there are too many unique classes. This is most commonly-experienced in chapter 19. - Attempting to set `MinimumUsableHolyWeapons` to 6 or higher may cause seed generation to fail due to being unable to place enough progressive weapon ranks. - Units that gain "overflow" exp over the level cap will show that EXP on the status page. This is a visual glitch only. - In some cases, enemies on otherwise-impassable terrain will be unable to move. If this occurs in a rout mission, this may require excessive RNG manipulation to clear. - Player units will use generic palettes. - In chapter 9 Ephraim, enemies are programmed to ignore Tana, but may move towards her anyway. - The Universal Tracker may report unintuitive unlocks. - All Summoners other than Ewan and Knoll share a summon "slot", meaning only one Summoner may have a phantom on the field at once.

entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.4.0
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.4.0 [Beta]
The UT and Skill Update.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.
Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.4.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.4.0).
## New
- Universal Tracker Glitched Logic support. In the context of this game, glitched logic remove sustain and battle logic. - Universal Tracker yaml-less support - Merged the option `remove_skills_requirements` with the new option. - Added the new option `skill_requirement_shuffle`. It has the following values: - **Vanilla:** Vanilla Requirements. Nothing is changed. - **Remove:** Removes the skills requirement from the game. This mean that every skill are learnable by themselves from level 1 (if unlocked). - **Level Shuffle:** The required skills are kept the same, but the level requirement are randomized. - **Non-Root Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees. - **Non-Root Shuffle:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees. - **Full Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees. - **Full Shuffle:** All skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees.** - **Chaos:** All skills requirements are randomized. Mastery are not prioritized as primary requirement. No chain dependency limit.
## Fixes
- Automatic Quest Reward Scouting crashing the client under specific circumstances - Improved reliability for Clear Key and Violet Key special flag handling.
## Misc
- Major Logic Engine refactoring. This fixed most potential generation problems, and improved generation performances.

entry.title: NSMBW v0.2.2
entry.content:
# New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.2 ## Features - Deathlink amnesty - New option for hintmovie logic - Logo in launcher - Option to use xdotool instead of root access for Linux - More debug comands
## Bug fixes - Logic: Spin jump logic, 5-1 climb, etc - One of the issues with connecting - Grouped deathlink

entry.title: Anno 1800 v1.3.1
entry.content:
Just a quick bugfix release to make Universal Tracker work with Anno 1800 again.
### Changes * Fixed Universal Tracker breaking when progressive items are enabled * Fixed duplicate starting items if multiple instances of Anno 1800 are in the same multiworld * Added section on how to make money to the main game page
This release is compatible with multiworlds from v1.3.0 onwards.
### [Game Page](<https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/en_Anno%201800.md>) | [Setup](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/setup_en.md) | [Items](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/items_en.md) | [Locations](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/locations_en.md) | [Roadmap](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/roadmap_en.md)
Find the apworld and a several template yamls below.

entry.title: Zelda's Adventure GDX v0.1.0r5
entry.content: ## What's Changed * Feature: stylized archipelago pickup sprite courtesy of Spectremint by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/95 * Feature: Clean up archipelago config screen and add password field by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/100 * Fix: Make Llort reward 250 rubies on defeat by @sshrrutiiii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 ## New Contributors * @sshrrutiiii made their first contribution in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.2

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.6
entry.content:
## New Features * "Priority" option added for tasks to be in priority locations * Added "prev" and "sequential" keywords to task pre-reqs. "prev" will establish a requirement on the previous task in sequence. "sequential" can be used in tasks where count > 1 in order to make each task in the duplicates sequential dependent (i.e. second task in duplicate depends on completing the first, third on second, fourth on third, etc.) * Task location names now display in non-taskipelago clients
## Bug Fixes * Fixed a bug with the way goal state is detected * Added a check to prevent yaml generation when the yaml would have no location available at multiworld start to prevent location starvation * Fixed another filler generation bug * General clean-up
## Known Issues * Universal Tracker is unhappy with the structure of the datapackage because of the dynamic nature of Taskipelago's location names. This is aimed to be resolved in a future patch.

entry.title: Arkham Horror The Card Game v0.1.4
entry.content: Change how items are disambiguated between campaigns and only include the disambiguation if required Added more locations to Wages of Sin Couple bugfixes

entry.title: Mario Kart Wii v0.2.3
entry.content:
## Release Version 0.2.3: Multiple Fixes Got a log of reports that victory trophies were being assigned when they shouldn't be. This has been fixed and while I was at it I also fixed some other stuff.
### Changelog: - Fixed victory trophy count not being reset upon reconnect. - Fixed tracker SSL connection issues. - Fixed logging only partly showing up in the cmd window. - Fixed unlock-block patch message spam. - Added a small visual to the tracker to be able to track your victory trophies. - Updated some documentation :) .
**REQUIRES APWORLD VERSION 0.2.0 - 0.2.3**
_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.2.2...v0.2.3

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.11r2
entry.content:
Various bugfixes
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.4.1
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.4.1 [Beta]
The UT and Skill Update hotfix.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
This update must be installed on the host. The client can have 0.4.0 or 0.4.1 installed.
Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.4.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.4.0).
## Fixes
- Fixed an oversight causing generation failure during the calculate playthrough step with some settings

entry.title: Spirit Valley v2.1.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld) Redid rules to use Rule Builder allowing for "/explain" to be used in UT - (APworld) Fixed main/side mission battles being in logic when the associated mission isn't - (Client) fixed sending goal locations when server has client release disabled
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
CLIENT: - Have Spirit Valley Installed - Download Spirit Valley Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Spirit Valley Archipelago Client V#.#.#.zip" to the directory where "SpiritValley.exe" is
APWORLD (needed for generating archieplago game): - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Spirit Valley APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Spirit Valley APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recommended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default spirit valley YMAL

entry.title: Zelda's Adventure GDX v0.1.0r2r2
entry.content:
## What's Changed * fix(ap) sync the inventory after initially loading a save by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/105 * fix(ap) remove double connect initialization to let the game disconnect properly by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/106 * feat(zelda) rework pushback negation, zelda can always walk off screens now by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/107 * fix(npc) make voice lines pause instead of stop to avoid skipping by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/108
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.3

entry.title: Pokemon FireRed and LeafGreen Prelease v1.0.1
entry.content:
ROM CHECKSUM: `6DEAB618`
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/vyneras/Archipelago/blob/1.1.0-beta.2/worlds/pokemon_frlg_prerelease/docs/setup_en.md) [Rom Changes](https://github.com/vyneras/Archipelago/blob/1.1.0-beta.2/worlds/pokemon_frlg_prerelease/docs/rom%20changes.md)
**Apworld Updates** - Updated client to support full Entrance Rando tracking in PopTracker - New option `item_appearance_matches_contents` - Changes the color of item balls to match their contents. Green balls contain progression items, blue balls contain useful items, and red balls contain filler or trap items
**Known Issues** - The `base_stats` option does not affect Deoxys attack/defense forms - The Rival battle in Oak's Lab can occasionally softlock the game. Recommend saving before triggering the battle
